subcodes.first_line: O Physician of bodies and hearts! Thy letter was received, and its contents were laden with sighs and cries of separation and estrangement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب اجسام و قلوب نامه شما رسید مضمون آه و فغان از دوری و مهجوری بود که
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
